hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); printf '%s' "$f" | grep -Eq '(\.(test|spec)\.[cm]?[jt]sx?$)|/__tests__/' && jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"test-driven-development skill: the MAIN agent must not author test files. Each test is written by a test-writer sub-agent (via the Agent tool) from the public interface alone. If you are running /implement or any TDD flow and have not loaded /test-driven-development, load it now and delegate this test to the sub-agent. If you ARE the test-writer sub-agent, disregard this reminder."}}' || true
